bacon-wrapped-dates-with-parmesan.name: Bacon-wrapped Dates With Parmesan

ingredients.item: Twenty-four 3-inch strips of very thinly sliced bacon

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C.
Using a small paring knife, cut a small slit across the length of each date.
Cut the cheese into approximately 1/2-inch-by-1/4-inch rectangles (the cheese will not cut into perfect shapes, but that's OK).
Insert a piece of Parmigiano into each date.

Lay the strips of bacon out on a work space, next to each other. One by one, place each date at the end of a strip of bacon, and then carefully roll the date along the bacon strip, wrapping it tightly.
Place the bacon-wrapped dates on a roasting rack set in a baking sheet, and roast for 10 to 15 minutes, until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Arrange the dates in a bowl with the parsley leaves.
Remember to warn your guests that the dates are hot!

bacon-y-carnitas-tacos.name: Bacon-y Carnitas Tacos
instructions: Coarsely chop 6 oz. bacon and transfer to a Dutch oven. Cut 1½ lb. pork shoulder into 1½"-thick pieces and add to pot. Add 1½ tsp. salt and cover meat with water—not so much water that the pieces are bobbing around, but you want them almost entirely submerged.

Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and cover pot. Simmer, lifting lid occasionally to stir and poking pieces of pork with a fork to test for tenderness after the first half hour, until tender, 45–60 minutes. When you lift the lid, you want to see gentle bubbles. If you see rapid bubbling or no bubbling at all, adjust your heat accordingly.

While pork is cooking, prep the rest of your ingredients. Drain 14 oz. tomatoes in a colander or strainer. Smash 2 garlic cloves and discard skins. Peel 1 red onion and thinly slice about a quarter of it. Place slices on the side of cutting board and cover with a damp paper towel. Coarsely chop remaining onion. Pick about 1 cup cilantro leaves with tender stems and cover with a damp paper towel on cutting board. Run knife through remaining cilantro to coarsely chop (stems included).

Combine drained tomatoes, garlic, 2 chipotle chiles, 2 tsp. agave syrup, coarsely chopped onion, and coarsely chopped cilantro in a blender. Cut 1 lime in half and squeeze in juice. Blend on high until salsa is smooth (you should have about 1¾ cups). Season with salt.

Check to make sure pork is fork-tender. When you slide tines of a fork into a piece and twist, the fibers will easily separate. At this point, uncover pot and increase heat to medium. Let pork bubble away until water is evaporated, 10–15 minutes.

At this point, the pork will begin to sputter and splatter. To protect yourself from the burning hot flying pork fat, place lid back on pot slightly ajar and increase heat to medium-high. After about 2 minutes of the pork sizzling in its own fat, reduce heat to low and lift lid to check on it. You want the undersides of the pieces to be browned and crispy. If they’re not, put the lid back on and increase heat again. Cook for another minute or two.

Once pork is browned on first side, use a spatula to loosen and turn pieces by scraping bottom. Put lid back on slightly cockeyed and crank heat again until second side is browned, 2–3 minutes. Repeat process of covering and browning meat, then uncovering and turning pieces, once or twice more until browned and crispy all over. Remove pot from heat.
Warm tortillas by grasping with tongs and waving them over a gas burner, or wrap in damp paper towels and microwave 30 seconds.
Serve carnitas with warm tortillas, salsa, and reserved sliced onion and cilantro leaves. Cut remaining lime into wedges and serve alongside.

bairrada-style-blushing-chicken-teleculi.name: Bairrada-style Blushing Chicken
bairrada-style-blushing-chicken-teleculi.original_name: Galinha corada à moda da Bairrada
instructions: Cut the chicken into pieces, season with chopped garlic teeth, white wine, salt, pepper and meat broth. Involve and let marinate for 20 minutes.
Transfer the chicken and marinade to a tray, add the lard and olive oil and wrap it again. Take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for 50 minutes, turning from time to time.
After the time indicated, water with the lemon juice and let it roast for another 10 minutes. Serve, accompanied by roasted potatoes with skin and decorated with orange buds.

bake-this-lemon-cake-without-sugar-comed.name: Bake This Lemon Cake Without Sugar
bake-this-lemon-cake-without-sugar-comed.original_name: Hornea este panqué de limón sin azúcar

ingredients.item: 280 gr de mantequilla sin sal o light
3 cda stevia powder or liquid (you can also use honey)

instructions: For this recipe I love to use a mixer as it's more practical and will give more spontaneity to the panda. But if you don't have the equipment, there's no problem. You can do that manually, but you'll need a lot of force in your arms.)
In a bowl, you'll add the butter and stevia and we'll beat at medium speed for 5 minutes. When we put these two ingredients together, we will get a whiteness and very creamy mixture.
Slow down your mixer and you will add the eggs, one by one progressively until they have all been integrated.
Later you will add the juice and frilling of lemons, mix very well and add billing powder.
Finally, we will soon add half of wheat flour, mix very well.
We stop the mixer and we will use a miser or pat to incorporate the rest of the flour and with wrapped movements we will mix. Be sure there aren't any clumps.
Preheat your oven at 170 degrees Celsius.
Fold your mold (I like to use the typical bread) with some butter. Stretch the mixture into the mold and give some noodle so that there's no air at the bottom and everything's settled.

Hornea for about 45 minutes, at this time should be super ready. But, apply the technique of inserting a wooden stick, if you get out humerus, you'll leave it 5 minutes more, if it gets completely dry, it's more than perfect.
We're done! Let cool so that you can crumble and slice to taste.

baked-alaska-ice-cream-and-meringue-alas.name: Baked Alaska (ice Cream And Meringue Alaska Cake)
baked-alaska-ice-cream-and-meringue-alas.original_name: Baked Alaska (Tarta Alaska de helado y merengue)
instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 been 3 and forms a rectangular plate with oven paper.
Separa las claras de las yemas de 4 huevos.
Bate las claras con una pizca de sal hasta punto de nieve bien firme.
In another bowl, beat the yolks with 120 g of sugar till they whitened and the mixture was thicker.
Add 120 g of steamed flour little by little to the yolks and blend with softness.
Termina incorporando las claras montadas en 2 o 3 tandas, con movimientos envolventes, para que no se bajen.
Expand the dough onto the plate, moist and 8-10 minutes (the idea is that it will be made but flexible, without resounding).
When you get her out, remove her onto another paper and let her cool well before riding the Alaska baked.

In the meantime, get the ice cream ready. It removes 500 ml of vanilla ice cream, 500 ml of strawberry ice cream and 500 ml of chocolate ice cream and allows them to soften slightly for 10-15 minutes, only fair to work them without completely melting them.

Fold a round bowl about 18-20 cm in diameter with clear film and let it stand out at the edges. Cut the biscuit into strips and pieces that will allow you to fully moan the inside of the bowl, covering bottom and sides. Reaping the biscuit well, pressurizing gently so that there are no gaps.
It begins to complete the bowl by placing an ice cream cape, put it with a spatula and continue with the other flavors and form layers to get about to the edge.
Cover the pint with more biscuits and close the surface well so that the ice cream will be completely wrapped. Press slightly to compact.
It covers with the film that stands out and takes the set to the freezer for 4-5 hours, or until completely firm. That step is key to keeping the Alaska baked shape as it crumbles.
When it's well frozen, prepare the meringue. Bat 4 egg clear with a pint of salt and, when they start to moist, add about 200 g of sugar, beating up to get a very firm and bright meringue.

Unmold the Alaska baked with care, place it onto an oven-free plate and cover it completely with the meringue, creating peaks and reliefs with a spatula or spoon. It leads to the hot oven or grill and dors meringue for 3-5 minutes, monitoring closely so that it doesn't get burned.
Serve immediately, cutting into portions, to enjoy the contrast between hot meringue and cold ice cream inside.

baked-brown-sugar-salmon.name: Baked Brown Sugar Salmon
instructions: Mix brown sugar, melted butter, soy sauce and sherry together in a small bowl.
Place salmon fillets in a baking dish and pour brown sugar sauce over top. Allow to sit at room temperature for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until salmon flakes easily with a fork, about 10 minutes.

baked-chicken-fajitas.name: Baked Chicken Fajitas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x13-inch baking pan with cooking spray.

Place chicken in the bottom of the prepared pan and sprinkle with taco seasoning. Add potatoes, onion, bell pepper, garlic, oregano, and hot pepper sauce. Pour undrained tomatoes over top and cover with aluminum foil or lid.

Bake in the preheated oven until potatoes are tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 1 hour. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the chicken should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

baked-hake-with-sage-and-lemon-teleculin.name: Baked Hake With Sage And Lemon
baked-hake-with-sage-and-lemon-teleculin.original_name: Pescada no forno com salva e limão
instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e pimenta. Descasque a cebola e os alhos, corte a cebola em rodelas grossas e esmague os dentes de alho. Numa travessa ou tabuleiro de forno (20x30 cm), deite metade do azeite e disponha a cebola no centro.

Place the fish over the onion and, under each post, "entale" a clove of garlic, 1 leaf of sage and a piece of laurel. Wash the lemon, cut it in 5 slices, lay them on the fish posts and water with the rest of the oil.
Take the tray to the oven, preheated at 185°C, for about 20 to 25 minutes. Serve hot, accompanied by roasted potatoes with skin.

baked-halibut-sitka.name: Baked Halibut Sitka

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 246°C (245 degrees C).
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Season halibut with salt and ground black pepper.
Place halibut in the greased baking dish.
Combine green onions, mayonnaise, sour cream, and dill in a bowl.
Spread green onion mixture evenly over each halibut piece.
Bake in the preheated oven until fish is opaque and flakes easily with a fork, about 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let stand for 5 minutes before serving.

baked-italian-chicken-thighs.name: Baked Italian Chicken Thighs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Combine ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, Italian seasoning, and salt in a small bowl; set aside.
Season chicken thighs on both sides with garlic powder and salt.

Heat olive oil in an oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken thighs, smooth-side down, in hot oil until the bottoms are browned, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip thighs over and remove the skillet from heat. Top each thigh with an equal amount of ricotta cheese mixture. Spoon marinara sauce on top and around chicken thighs.

Bake in the preheated oven until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the centers of thighs should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Top each thigh with mozzarella cheese and continue baking until cheese is melted, 2 to 3 minutes. Garnish with parsley to serve.

baked-pancetta-with-potatoes-argiro.name: Baked Pancetta With Potatoes
instructions: We prepare the potatoes first. Clean, cut into something pieces and add them to a pot.
Cover with water and cover.
As soon as they get built, let them bottle for 15 minutes, soften.
Drain them well and pour them into a baking pan.
Add olive oil, mustard, oregano, lemon, salt and pepper to a bowl and mix well.
Pour the potatoes into the baking pan and mix them.
Add salt and pepper to the punchta and add it to the potatoes.

baked-quince-with-cinnamon.name: Baked Quince With Cinnamon
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Press 3 cloves into each quince half, then place fruit cut-side down in a roasting pan. Add water, wine, and cinnamon sticks to the pan; sprinkle sugar over fruit.

Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 35 to 40 minutes. Turn quince right-side up and continue baking until tender, about 10 more minutes. Remove from the oven and let quince cool slightly.
Transfer each quince half to a plate. Top each with 1 tablespoon juice from the roasting pan and a dollop of whipped cream.

baked-quinces-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Baked Quinces In The Oven

ingredients.item: 220 gr. Sweet marsala wine or marsala marsafne
220 gr. Sweet marsala wine or marsala marsafne

instructions: Wash and dry the quinces.
Cut into nick quince slides and remove the heart and pits.
In a small baking pan, add half the sugar, touch the quinces in slices, sprinkle with the rest of the sugar and add all the indoors.
Pour the butter into pieces.
Cover with non-stick paper and fol, sawing the baking pan well.
Bake in a well-heated oven, at 170-180oC, in the air, for 2 hours with the baking pan covered and 30 minutes more exposed.
From time to time, turn the fruit over and pour it with the baking syrup.
Enjoy the roasted quince alone, with yogurt or ice cream and almond fillet.

baked-shank-with-sauteed-vegetables-lezz.name: Baked Shank With Sauteed Vegetables
instructions: 1. C&uuml onion;p in the form of chopped olive oil until pink.
2. Add Salça butter and continue roasting.
3. Add the pearls and put a few in the fire of minutes.
4. Taste salt, pepper, kimyon.
5. Add water until you go over.
6. Bake the jealous fire and until the meats soften.
7. Transfer it to an oven container together with the sauce of pearls.
8. Cook until the oven, set to 200 degrees.
9. After boiling brocoli and carnflower in steam, soak in less amount of olive oil with cherry tomatoes.
10. Serve the beans and vegetables on the tab.

bakers-pork-chops-teleculinaria.name: Baker's Pork Chops
instructions: Peel and wash the onions and garlic teeth, pinch garlic teeth and cut the onions into thin half-moons. Fix the chops, season them with garlic teeth, sweet pepper, salt and pepper, wrap well and let marinate for 20 minutes.
Peel, wash and cut the gowns into buds. Lay out on a tray the onions, potatoes, olive oil, salt and pepper and bring the preheated oven to 180°C for 40 minutes.
Light the butter to melt, add the chops and let it fry on both sides. Then remove the meat for a plate, water the pan with the white wine, add the mustard beans and let it boil well.
Water over the chops, decorate with chopped pickles and olives and serve to accompany the potatoes to the baker.

bananas-foster.name: Bananas Foster
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Toast 3 Tbsp. pecans on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, 10–12 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.

Heat 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, ¼ cup (packed; 50 g) dark brown sugar, ½ tsp. ground cinnamon, and ¼ tsp. ground cardamom in a medium skillet over medium-high, whisking constantly as the mixture bubbles, until butter is melted and incorporated, about 1 minute. Add ½ tsp. vanilla extract and cook sauce, continuing to whisk, until slightly thickened, about 30 seconds.

Arrange 2 bananas, halved lengthwise, then crosswise, cut side down, in pan and cook, shaking pan occasionally, until lightly browned, 30–60 seconds. Using tongs or a small spatula, turn bananas over and sprinkle cut sides with kosher salt. Cook, shaking pan occasionally, until bananas are browned and coated in sauce, 30–60 seconds. Remove from heat.
Drizzle 3 Tbsp. dark rum (80–100 proof) over bananas and sauce. Using lighter, carefully ignite sauce and flambé, shaking pan occasionally, until flame goes out.

Top with scoops of vanilla ice cream and scatter pecans over.


Editor’s note: This way for more of our best banana recipes →

barley-soup-with-kale-and-meatballs-very.name: Barley Soup With Kale And Meatballs: Very Delicious And
barley-soup-with-kale-and-meatballs-very.original_name: Sopa de cebada con col rizada y albóndigas: muy rica y fácil

ingredients.item: 500 gr de carne molida o de res

instructions: En un bol grande, mezcla la carne molida con el huevo, pan rallado, cebolla, ajo, perejil, sal, pimienta y comino.
It forms small meatballs about 3 cm in diameter.
Reserve the meatballs in the refrigerator while you prepare the soup.
rinse the barley well under cold water and then cook it into a pot with slightly salted water for about 20-25 minutes, or until soft but firm. Drain and reserve.
In a big pot, it heats olive oil with medium heat. Add onion, garlic, celery and carrots. It's cold for about 5- 7 minutes, till they're tender.
Add a broth, a bay leaf, a thyme and a baked barley. It leads to boiling, then reduces fire and cooks with low heat for 10 minutes.
Add meatballs one by one to soup. Cooking for 10- 12 minutes, till they are well cooked.
Finally, add the cabbage and cook another 5 minutes, till the cabbage is soft but still light green.
Retira la hoja de laurel. Ajusta la sal y la pimienta al gusto. Sirve la sopa caliente, decorada con perejil fresco picado.

bazzina-with-spinach-argiro.name: Bazzina With Spinach

ingredients.item: A little olive oil for baking the pie
A little olive oil for baking the pie

instructions: Wash, drag and chop the spinach.
Sauté for 5–10 minutes to swat. Then squeeze it very well and transfer to a bowl.
Add the olive oil, feta cheese, onions, leeks, herbs, eggs, trahanas and pepper and mix well.
In a separate bowl, add the flowers, semolina, yogurt, oil, some salt and 2 cups of water. Mix until a thinks Porridge is formed.
Add a large, shallow baking pan and spread 2/3 of the dough with a spoon.
Spread the filling and gently press it with the Fingers to spread evening.
Add 1/2 cup of water and mix to dilute. Pour the pie evening.
Drizzle with some olive oil and baking in a pre-heated oven at 2003
It is very important that the bagina with spinach is think in thinkingness, so that it is primarily dried and has a Crisp texture.

bbq-chicken-bacon-skewers.name: Bbq Chicken Bacon Skewers
instructions: Preheat grill to medium heat.
Combine the chicken, bbq sauce, salt, and pepper, stirring until evenly mixed.

Threading one end of the bacon onto the end of a skewer. Add a piece of chicken, and weave the bacon around the chicken and back through the skewer, creating a wave pattern between the chicken. Move the bacon and the chicken down the skewer, repeating until the other edge of the bacon is threaded through.
Repeat on the rest of the skewers with the remaining chicken and bacon.
Grease the surface of the grill by rubbing the grates with tongs and an oiled paper towel.
Grill the skewers for about 12-18 minutes with the lid closed, flipping them halfway.
Enjoy!

bbq-ribs-recipe-in-air-fryer-comedera.name: Bbq Ribs Recipe In Air Fryer
bbq-ribs-recipe-in-air-fryer-comedera.original_name: Receta de costillas BBQ en airfryer
instructions: En un bol grande, vierte la taza de salsa barbacoa, la paprika, el ajo en polvo y las hierbas provenzales.
Agrega sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla muy bien hasta que formes una pasta.
Take your ribs and cut into pieces the size of your taste.
Incorpora las costillas en el bol y mezcla muy bien hasta que queden impregnadas con la salsa. Deja marinar por 20 minutos.
When you have passed the tidal, preheat the air fryer at 180 ° C
Once ready, pour the ribs into the airfryer bowl and cook for a 20-minute range.
Check his or her seedling and check his or her ribs and make sure that they don't get burned or light. If you think she wants more time, she's billing for about 15 or 20 more minutes.
Once they're ready, you have only to taste them.

beef-vindaloo-lezzet.name: Beef Vindaloo
instructions: 1. To crush, all the materials are a rough and thoroughly mix.
2. Take the mixture into a pan and sauce for 10 minutes.
3. Cook the peppers until they were softened.
4. Take the mixture from the strainer and make it pure.
5. Heat the oil into a pan.
6. Add onion and soak up to pink.
7. Add meat and cook for 10 minutes.
8. Add Ginger, bitter pepper and yellowms and soak for 5 minutes.
9. Add tomato porridge, yogurt and salt in line.
10. Cook the broth for 20 minutes until you leave it.
11. 11. Serve hot by decorating with fresh cook.

beer-battered-fairytale-eggplant-with-le.name: Beer-battered Fairytale Eggplant With Lemon-garlic Yogurt Sauce
instructions: Pour oil into a large heavy skillet to a depth of 1” and heat over high heat. Mix beer, flour, cayenne, and salt in a bowl. Dip eggplant halves into batter and fry until golden brown, about 2 minutes; turn and cook until golden brown on other side, about 2 minutes longer. Transfer eggplants to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. Combine yogurt, lemon juice, and garlic in a small bowl and drizzle lightly over eggplant, or serve separately for dipping.

before-daylight.name: Before Daylight
instructions:
Bring 6 oz. fresh or frozen blackberries and ¼ cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Cook, stirring and mashing berries with a potato masher or fork, until soft and pulpy, about 5 minutes. Add 1 cup sugar and cook, stirring often, until dissolved, about 3 minutes. Let cool.
Do Ahead: Blackberry syrup can be made 1 week ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

To make 1 cocktail, combine one quarter of one 4" piece ginger, peeled, thinly sliced, 1¼ oz. mezcal, 1¼ oz. sweet vermouth, 1 oz. fresh lime juice, and 1 oz. blackberry syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 30 seconds.
Fill a tall glass two thirds full with crushed ice; pour in 2 oz. ginger ale. Strain cocktail into glass. Garnish with a fresh or frozen blackberry.

berbere-spice-blend.name: Berbere Spice Blend
instructions: Place ground chiles, paprika, and cayenne pepper into a bowl; stir. Add onion powder, ginger, cumin, coriander, cardamom, fenugreek, garlic powder, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and nutmeg. Gently whisk together until thoroughly mixed.
Store in an airtight container, preferably glass.

bergamot-liqueur-argiro.name: Bergamot Liqueur

ingredients.item: 1 lt pure alcohol of beverages or vodka
1 lt pure alcohol of beverages or vodka

instructions: Wash the Fruits well and dry them with a clean towel.
With the tool that peels the cars or with a sharp knife remove the yellow peel careful (as thin as possible).
Place the peels in a jar.
We pour alcohol.
Leave it sealed for a week.
Dissolve the sugar with water in a pot.
As soon as it boils, remove it from the heat and let it cool.
Remove the peels from alcohol.
Add the light syrup to alcohol and mix.
We strain it into a tulip and split it into glass bottles.
The liquor is served cold.

better-than-pumpkin-pie.name: Better Than Pumpkin Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Place pie crust in a 9-inch pie plate; set aside.
Place squash in a saucepan, add enough water to cover by 1 inch, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium; simmer until squash is tender, about 15 minutes. Drain and cool.
Combine squash, brown sugar, milk, egg, cornstarch, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, ginger, and nutmeg in the bowl of a food processor or blender; pulse until smooth. Pour filling into crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into center comes out clean, about 50 minutes.

bills-sausage-gravy.name: Bill's Sausage Gravy
instructions: Place sausage in a large, deep skillet. Cook and crumble over medium-high heat until evenly brown.
Remove sausage with a slotted spoon, leaving the drippings in the pan. Stir butter into the pan until melted.
Add flour and stir until smooth.
Reduce heat to medium and cook until light brown.
Gradually whisk in milk and cook until thickened. Season with salt and pepper.
Add cooked sausage back to the skillet. Reduce heat and simmer for 12 to 15 minutes. If gravy becomes too thick, stir in a little more milk.
Serve over biscuits and enjoy!

binada-sauce-salad-dressing-lezzet.name: Binada Sauce (salad Dressing)
instructions: 1. melt powder sugar in a small bowl by mixing inside vinegar.
2. Then take onion, pickled, garlic, egg yolk and sugar vinegar into the kitchen robot.
3. Pull it to become pure.
4. Take the mixture you prepared in a bowl, yeast, ketchup and bitter pepper sauce, and mix until you get a homogeneous consistency.
5. Taste and serve with pepper and salt.

biscuit-croquettes-teleculinaria.name: Biscuit Croquettes

ingredients.item: 100 g of butter at room temperature
50 g of dried fruit (nut, almond and hazelnuts)

instructions: 1. Crush the cookies until they're like grated bread. Put it in a bowl, add the butter and egg and mix well.
2. Add the previously minced dried fruits and mix until a moldable mass is obtained.
3. Mold small croquettes and pass some by cocoa powder, others by powdered sugar and you can make the rest simple.
4. Take it to the fridge until it's time to serve.

biscuit-the-sweet-cheese.name: Biscuit: The Sweet Cheese

ingredients.item: Great value® finely shredded sharp cheddar cheese

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Using your hands or a pastry cutter, work the butter into the dry ingredients, leaving large chunks.
Add the buttermilk and fold with a rubber spatula until fully incorporated and the dough comes together in a ball.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and roll out to about 2 inches (5 cm) thick.
Using a round pastry cutter, divide the dough into 12 pieces and place on the prepared baking sheet. Top each biscuit with cheddar cheese.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown.
Serve the biscuits with raspberry preserves and whipped cream.
Enjoy!

black-garlic-caesar-salad.name: Black Garlic Caesar Salad

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about  0.5 cup), plus more for serving
leaves separated, largest leaves halved crosswise

instructions: Purée 3 oz. black garlic, peeled (about 6 cloves), ⅓ cup fresh lemon juice, and ¼ cup warm water in a blender until smooth. Add one 2-oz. tin oil-packed anchovy fillets, drained, coarsely chopped, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about ½ cup), and season with freshly ground pepper; blend until smooth. With motor running, gradually stream in ⅔ cup extra-virgin olive oil; blend until incorporated.

Place 4 heads of romaine lettuce, leaves separated, largest leaves halved crosswise, in a large bowl; drizzle dressing over as desired and toss to coat. (Save any remaining dressing for another use.) Transfer salad to a platter. Tear shiso leaves over (if using) and top with more Parmesan.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

blackened-steak-bites-with-blue-cheese-s.name: Blackened Steak Bites With Blue Cheese Sauce

ingredients.prep: such as Chef Paul Prudhomme's® Blackened Steak Magic®

instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat.
Season beef with blackened seasoning to coat on all sides.

Heat oil in a cast iron skillet on the preheated grill until oil is smoking. Cook beef in hot oil in small batches, reheating oil between batches, until slightly crusty, 1 to 2 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 60°C (60 degrees C) for medium doneness. Remove beef to a serving plate.

Make sauce: Stir together cream cheese and evaporated milk in a saucepan over low heat until cream cheese is melted. Whisk in blue cheese crumbles, garlic powder, white pepper, and cayenne pepper; simmer, stirring frequently, until sauce is smooth, 2 to 3 minutes.
Serve blue cheese sauce with beef.

blat-pizza-with-basil-mayo.name: Blat Pizza With Basil Mayo
instructions: {'level': '1', 'step': 'Preheat the oven to 220 degrees C.', 'note': ''}

blistered-shishito-peppers.name: Blistered Shishito Peppers
instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat (or heat a dry large cast-iron skillet over medium-high). Toss peppers with oil; season with salt and pepper. Grill, turning occasionally, until tender and blistered all over, about 3 minutes.
Transfer to a small bowl and toss with vinegar. Let cool; remove stems.

blood-orange-martini.name: Blood Orange Martini

ingredients.item: Fluid ounce orange-flavored liqueur (such as cointreau®)

instructions: Place ice cubes in a cocktail shaker; top with blood orange juice, vodka, and orange-flavored liqueur. Cover the shaker and shake.
Strain drink into a martini glass. Top with orange juice and garnish with lime wedge.

blueberry-muffins-argiro.name: Blueberry Muffins

ingredients.item: 1 cup fresh blueberries washed and dry
3 tablespoons of flour for all uses
1 cup fresh blueberries washed and dry
3 tablespoons of flour for all uses

instructions: Prepare the jam first by pouring all the ingredients into a small vessel.
With a fork, melt some blueberries to remove their color, but leave most of them whole.
Boil the mixture for 2-3 minutes, until it binds slightly to a red jam. We let it cool.
Mix in a bowl the ingredients for the crust and rub the mixture with our fingers, to obtain wet sand texture. Put it away.
We bring all the muffin ingredients to room temperature.
Lay in a large baking pan for muffins. Preheat the oven to 170°C, in the air.
Beat in a bowl with the wire the sunflower oil, cold melted butter, egg, yogurt, sugar, zest and lemon juice until unified.
Shake the flour, soda, salt and baking powder into the liquid ingredients.
Fold with a spatula to lose the flour without working too much on the mixture so that the dough does not harden.
Break some blueberries with a fork and add them to the mixture.
We incorporate the rest of the whole fruit by gently mixing.
Balance with a spoon the mixture in the paper cases by adding some red jam.
Garnish with jam with whole blueberries the surface of the muffins and sprinkle above with some of the crust mixture.

Bake the muffins on the medium rack of the preheated oven for about 25 minutes until they are inflated and stabilised. Before we take them off, we insert a toothpick into their center to make sure they're cooked to the inside.
Allow them to stand for 10 minutes in the form and then take them out and enjoy them.

blueberry-pie-argiro.name: Blueberry Pie
instructions: Spread one of the local leaves on a baking pan line with non-stick paper and baking at 180.3.3, in the air, for 10 minutes, to brown. Let it cool.
Add the leads to a pot with 1⁄2 cup. water and medium heat, for 10 minutes, until all liquids are softened and drunk.
Then add 4 tabletspons of the total olive oil and sauce for 5-6 minutes, without color.
Sprinkle with salt, pepper and nutmeg.
When they dry completey, we remove them from the fire.
Once their temperature drops, add the feta cheese, the cephalograviera and the milk and mix until the cheeses melt and have a creamy mixture.
Add the eggs slightly beaten and mix.
Finally break the Baked Leaf into sandwiches and indirect it into the filling.
Add a 36 cm baking pan and lay radially and slightly wrinkled three village leaves, sprinkled in between with some olive oil.
Spread over the top evening the filling of leads.
Turn the Edges of the leaves that are left over on the filling.
Cover the green pie with the last two leads, also oiled and slightly wrinkled.
Sprinkle the pie into pieces.
Sprinkle with the remaining olive oil and a few drops of water and baking it in a well preheated evening at 180°C, resistors and bottom grill for one hour.
For a crisper result, in the last quarter we only make in the lower residence.
After reserving the green pie from the ocean, cover it with a clean towel and let it stand 10 minutes before cutting and serving.

blueberry-spelt-muffins.name: Blueberry Spelt Muffins
instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Lightly coat a standard 12-cup muffin pan with nonstick spray or line with paper liners. Whisk spelt flour, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a medium bowl. Add butter and toss to coat. Working quickly, smash in butter with your fingers until pieces are about pea-size. Chill streusel until ready to use.

Whisk spelt flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a medium bowl until there are no lumps. Make a well in the center with your hands. Whisk egg, brown sugar, oil, buttermilk, and lemon zest in a small bowl. Pour into well and whisk to combine. Using a rubber spatula, gently fold in blueberries. Evenly divide batter among 8–10 muffin cups, filling each with about ¼ cup batter. Top each muffin with about 1 Tbsp. streusel; bake, rotating pan halfway through, until golden brown and a tester inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean, 24–27 minutes. Let muffins cool in pan 20 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack; let cool completely.
Do ahead: Muffins can be baked 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

boiled-asparagus-salad-argiro.name: Boiled Asparagus Salad
instructions: Clean the asparagus. If they are wild and very Tender, cut only the bottom of the cove. We do not peer wild asparagus, as they are delicate and Tender.
If grow, remove the white part by holding the stem and bedding it until it breaks.
With a peeling tool, remove the fibers in the asparagus stem (for cultured only).
Wash them very well in running water and drain them into a colander.
If the asparagus are think and Tender, tie the tassels with string.
Boil water in a small pot and add salt as soon as it boils.
Simmer the asparagus and bottle for a few minutes:
Tender wild asparagus: 3–4 minutes
Cultivated fat asparagus: Approximately 5–7 minutes
We prepare bass with cold water and ice cubes.
Once the asparagus boil, remove them with a dribbled sponge and sink them into the cold water to stop the building and remain green.
Drain and serve with olive oil.
Alternatively, built asparagus can be served with: Olandez sauce, grated parmesan, pose eggs
The water from the wild asparagus becomes red and can be used as a beverage with lemon – delicious and very healthy.

boiled-meatballs-with-garlic-sauce-lezze.name: Boiled Meatballs With Garlic Sauce
instructions: 1. Bulguru rubbed in a bowl with lean meat.
2.  Tuzu ilave edin.
3. When kneading your hand into the water and kneading meatballs from the paste consistency.
4. To prepare the inner tribute, soak onions in the chopped butter.
5. Add and roast the water.
6. Add crushed walnuts and spices when color starts to light.
7. Remove walnuts from dough.
8. After rolling with your hands, open the middle of the meatballs with your marker finger.
9. Place and close the inner mortar you prepared for.
10. Boil the water in the pot.
11. 11. Cook the prepared meatballs and 15-20 minutes.
12. For the sauce, boil your desired tomato and crushed yellowish in a sauce pot.
12. August After boiling, add small chopped peppers and vinegar and cook until peppers soften.

braised-lamb-shanks-with-fish-sauce.name: Braised Lamb Shanks With Fish Sauce

ingredients.prep: excess fat and silver skin trimmed

ingredients.item: Makrut lime leaves or 2 teaspoons finely grated lime zest
Homemade chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth

ingredients.prep: Thai or sweet basil, and/or celery leaves

instructions: Place smashed garlic in a resealable plastic bag along with lamb shanks and ¼ cup fish sauce. Seal bag, pressing out air. Turn lamb shanks to coat and chill at least 4 hours and up to 1 day.
Let lamb sit at room temperature 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 300°. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Remove lamb shanks from bag and add to pot; discard marinade. Cook shanks, turning occasionally, until browned evenly on all sides, 14–18 minutes. Transfer to a large plate.

Reduce heat to medium and cook shallots, cilantro stems, and finely chopped garlic in the same pot, stirring often and scraping up browned bits from the bottom, until shallots are golden, 5–7 minutes. Add chiles, lime leaves, bay leaves, stock, and ¼ cup fish sauce, and stir, scraping up any remaining stuck-on bits from bottom of pot. Bring to a simmer, return lamb to pot, and cover. Transfer to oven and braise until meat is pulling away from bones but not quite fork-tender, 50–60 minutes.
Turn shanks and add fennel and carrots to pot, submerging in liquid. Cover and braise until meat is very tender and nearly falling off the bone, 40–50 minutes. Let rest 15–20 minutes before serving.

Serve lamb shanks with fennel and carrots and some braising liquid (for a thicker sauce, simmer the braising liquid until it reduces slightly), topped with cilantro, basil, and/or celery leaves, and seasoned with a few more drops of fish sauce if desired.
Do Ahead: Lamb and vegetables can be braised 2 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat over low before topping with herbs and more fish sauce.

braised-lamb-shoulder-chops.name: Braised Lamb Shoulder Chops

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Season lamb chops with salt and pepper. Sear lamb in hot oil until browned, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Remove chops to a plate, reserving drippings in the skillet.
Sauté onion and garlic in reserved drippings over medium heat until onion is tender, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
Transfer lamb chops to a baking dish; add onion mixture. Sprinkle rosemary over chops. Pour beef broth and red wine into the baking dish. Cover the dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 3 hours. Remove lamb chops to a serving platter.

Carefully pour liquid from the baking dish into a saucepan. Whisk together water and cornstarch in a bowl until no lumps remain; stir into liquid in the saucepan. Add Worcestershire sauce and cook over medium heat until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Spoon sauce over lamb chops and serve.

breaded-pork-strips-with-barbecue-sauce-.name: Breaded Pork Strips With Barbecue Sauce
breaded-pork-strips-with-barbecue-sauce-.original_name: Tiras de porco panadas com molho barbecue
instructions: Cut the meat into strips 1 cm wide, pass them by flour, egg shakes and grated bread and fry them in very hot oil. Spill them well on absorbent paper, season them with salt and pepper and reserve.
Prepare o molho: refogue a cebola e os alhos, descascados e picados, no azeite, depois adicione os restantes ingredientes, envolva bem e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, por cerca de 15 minutos.
In the end, slightly crush the sauce with the magic wand and serve with the pork strips.

brisket.name: Brisket

ingredients.item: -pound piece untrimmed point- or flat-cut beef brisket
Diamond crystal or 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons morton kosher salt; plus more
Manischewitz concord grape wine or concord grape juice

instructions: Season brisket all over with ground pepper and ¼ cup Diamond Crystal or 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. Morton salt, rubbing into the grain. Wrap tightly in plastic and chill at least 3 hours and up to 3 days.

Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 275°. Heat schmaltz in a large roasting pan set over 2 burners on high. Unwrap brisket; cook, reducing heat if needed, until browned, 7–10 minutes per side. Transfer to a baking sheet.

Reduce heat to medium-high. Add onions, carrots, and celery to pan; season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and just softened, 15–18 minutes. Add wine, bring to a boil, and cook until evaporated, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic, thyme, bay leaves, and peppercorns. Pour in broth to come about halfway up sides of pan, then bring to a boil. Nestle brisket into aromatics and cover tightly with foil; braise in oven until meat is very tender but still holds its shape, 2–3 hours. Let cool, then chill at least 8 hours and up to 2 days.

Preheat oven to 250°. Remove solidified fat from surface of braising liquid; discard. Transfer brisket to a platter. Strain braising liquid into a large measuring glass; discard solids. Return liquid to pan and cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half, velvety and intensely flavored, but not overly salty, about 30 minutes.

Return brisket to pan, cover with foil, and heat in oven until warmed through, 60–90 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and slice against the grain. Arrange on platter and pour braising liquid over.

broas-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Broas In The Air Fryer
instructions: Start by biting the nut kernel. Bring a pot to the fire with the oil, sugar, water, honey, cinnamon, sweet grass and a pinch of salt. Let it boil and then add the flour.
Remove from the fire and stir with a spoon until everything is well involved. Take it back to the fire and move until the dough gets out of the pot. Remove and wrap the nut kernel.
Mold small breads with the anterior mass, place in air fryer lined with vegetable paper and program 200o, 10 minutes, repeat the operation as often as necessary until you finish cooking the breads.

broccoli-pizza-crust.name: Broccoli Pizza Crust
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place broccoli florets into a food processor and pulse until broccoli is riced. Transfer to a clean paper towel and squeeze out as much water as possible.

Place broccoli 'rice', mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, beaten egg, bread crumbs, garlic, basil, Italian seasoning, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes into a large bowl and mix until well combined. Separate into 4 equal golf ball-sized balls. Shape carefully into 4 individual-sized crusts. Place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until the bottom is lightly browned, about 30 minutes. Flip crusts and continue to bake until the other side is golden brown, 10 to 12 minutes more.

brownie-crisp.name: Brownie Crisp
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Combine sugar, butter, vanilla extract, and espresso powder together in a bowl; beat in egg whites. Stir flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl. Mix flour mixture into egg mixture until batter is combined. Spread batter as thin as a slice of American cheese onto the baking sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven until batter is nearly cooked through, about 20 minutes. Remove from the oven; cut a shallow square pattern into the batter with a sharp knife. Place back into the oven; bake until batter is crisp, about 5 minutes.
Cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely; break into squares.

brownie-taste-moist-cake-recipe-lezzet.name: Brownie Taste Moist Cake Recipe
brownie-taste-moist-cake-recipe-lezzet.original_name: Wet Cake Recipe on Brownie Tad

ingredients.item: 1 cup cocoa mixture (can be separated when preparing dough)

instructions: 1. Eggs and powder sugar in a deep container, sugar melt and blend up to the color area crack
2. Milk and add liquid oil and continue mixing.
3. Add Kakaoyu and purulent from flowing area to whip.
4. Take 1 cup from this mix; sos toside.
5. Add embossed flour, baking powder and vanilla to the remaining mixture.
6. Mix the spatula or mixer from low circulation, homogenous.
7. Oiled or oily kâ pulp pour to the debris pot.
8. From 170°C to 30–35 minutes.
9. When you are in the cake oven, add 1 cup of milk to the cocoa mixture.
10. From the oven to the first temperature of the cake is deerç when (2–3 minutes), spheremove holes hungryin and sosuüto the car.

buffalo-chickpea-wraps.name: Buffalo Chickpea Wraps
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the chickpeas and cook until lightly browned, 2-3 minutes.
Add the garlic powder, salt, and buffalo sauce and cook for 2 more minutes, until the sauce thickens and the chickpeas have browned. Set aside.
In a small bowl or liquid measuring cup, combine the hummus, lemon juice, and water and whisk thoroughly.
To assemble a wrap, top a tortilla with romaine, chickpeas, tomatoes, and red onion, then pour on the dressing.
Fold in the sides of the wrap and roll up like a burrito. Cut in half.
Enjoy!

bugnes-moelleuses-french-doughnuts.name: Bugnes Moelleuses (french Doughnuts)
instructions: Mix together water and yeast in a small bowl. Let stand until foamy, about 15 minutes.

Combine flour, eggs, butter, 1/2 cup plus 2 tablespoons sugar, and lemon zest in a large bowl. Pour in yeast mixture. Knead by hand until dough comes together. Cover the bowl with a dish towel and let dough rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 2 hours.
Roll out dough into a large rectangle on a lightly floured work surface. Cut out diamond-shaped doughnuts using a small pastry wheel cutter. Brush off excess flour.
Heat oil in a deep saucepan or wok over medium-high heat. Cook doughnuts in batches in hot oil until golden brown, about 1 minute per side. Drain on a paper towel-lined platter.

bundt-cake-fruit-celebration.name: Bundt Cake Fruit Celebration
instructions: Prepare and bake cake mix according to package directions for a 10 inch Bundt pan. Allow to cool completely.
Cover cake with cream cheese frosting. Pour pie filling over frosted cake.

buttermilk-panna-cotta-with-apricot-and-.name: Buttermilk Panna Cotta With Apricot And Candied Fennel
instructions: Place ¼ cup cold water in a small bowl. Sprinkle gelatin over; let stand 10 minutes.

Heat ½ cup cream in a medium saucepan over medium heat until very warm (it will deactivate the gelatin if it gets too hot). Remove from heat, add gelatin and ⅔ cup sugar, and whisk until they are completely dissolved. Gradually stir in remaining 2¼ cups cream, then buttermilk. Divide among eight small bowls or 6-oz. ramekins and chill until set, at least 4 hours.

Meanwhile, bring apricots, 2 Tbsp. sugar, and 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until thickened and jam-like, 20–25 minutes. Let compote cool completely.

Bring remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat and cook, swirling often, until thick and syrupy (do not let it take on any color), about 4 minutes. Add fennel seeds and reduce heat to medium. Cook, stirring constantly, until sugar starts to become dry and crystallized, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir until sugar is completely dry and crystallized, about 1 minute longer. Transfer seeds to a small bowl; set aside.
Serve panna cotta topped with compote and candied fennel seeds.
DO AHEAD: Panna cotta can be made 3 days ahead; cover and keep chilled. Compote can be made 1 week ahead; cover and chill.

butternut-squash-stuffin-muffins.name: Butternut Squash Stuffin’ Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Grease a muffin tin generously with nonstick spray.
Add the butternut squash to a medium bowl and toss with the olive oil, salt, pepper, and McCormick® Rubbed Sage until well coated.
Spread the butternut squash in an even layer on the prepared baking sheet. Roast for 25–30 minutes, tossing halfway, until the squash is tender and starting to brown. Remove from the oven.
Reduce the oven temperature to 191°C (190°C).
Add the roasted butternut squash to the stuffing base and stir to combine. Fold in the eggs until incorporated.
Spoon about ¼ cup (60 G) of the stuffing into each muffin cup, filling just above the rims. Press down gently with a spoon to release any air pockets.
Bake the stuffing cups for 30–35 minutes, or until cooked through and the tops are browned. Let rest in the muffin tin for 20 minutes, then run a knife around the edges of each cup to release.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

buttery-pie-crust.name: Buttery Pie Crust
instructions: Pulse flour, sugar, and salt in a food processor until combined.
Add butter; pulse until the mixture has the texture of very coarse meal.
Add 1/4 cup ice water; pulse, adding more water if the mixture appears dry, until the dough just comes together in clumps.
Form the dough into a square, wrap it tightly in plastic, and chill until firm, about 2 hours.
DO AHEAD: The crust can be made up to 3 days ahead. Keep it chilled in the refrigerator. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before rolling out.
